texto: We know that those things to which we have an emotional connection stick with us better than those for which we have none. Dramatization is a way to get your intellectual ideas across to your audience emotionally.
explicacao: Citação de Brian McDonald sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We know that those things to which we have an emotional connection stick with us better than thos…” articula reflexao, drama, writing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como writing.

frase_original: We know that those things to which we have an emotional connection stick with us better than those for which we have none. Dramatization is a way to get your intellectual ideas across to your audience emotionally.

texto: Stories are the collective wisdom of everyone who has ever lived. Your job as a storyteller is not simply to entertain. Nor is it to be noticed for the way you turn a phrase. You have a very important job--one of the most important. Your job is to let people know that everyone shares their feelings--and that these feelings bind us. Your job is a healing art, and like all healers, you have a responsibility. Let people know they are not alone. You must make people understand that we are all the same.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brian McDonald: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Stories are the collective wisdom of everyone who has ever lived. Your job as a storyteller is no…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiration, writing-from-the-heart pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e writing-from-the-heart.

frase_original: Stories are the collective wisdom of everyone who has ever lived. Your job as a storyteller is not simply to entertain. Nor is it to be noticed for the way you turn a phrase. You have a very important job--one of the most important. Your job is to let people know that everyone shares their feelings--and that these feelings bind us. Your job is a healing art, and like all healers, you have a responsibility. Let people know they are not alone. You must make people understand that we are all the same.
